global_description: Flat, elongated surface made of asphalt or concrete, typically gray or black, with painted lines for lanes, bordered by curbs or shoulders, designed for vehicles and pedestrians.

part_details.surface: Flat, smooth, gray or black, made of asphalt or concrete
part_details.lane_lines: Painted white or yellow lines dividing lanes
part_details.curbs: Raised edges along the sides, often concrete
part_details.shoulders: Flat areas beside lanes, sometimes gravel or paved
part_details.markings: Various symbols and lines for traffic guidance

spatial_relations: Lane lines run parallel along the surface
Curbs or shoulders border the road
Markings are painted on the surface
